cases.description: Skill opens Phase 1 by asking all five discovery questions before generating anything
cases.prompt: I need a BBVA presentation about our Q1 2026 results
expectations: Asks about content type (slides, document, social) before generating
Asks about output format (HTML, PDF, PPTX, DOCX, PNG)
Asks about theme preference (dark or light)
Does NOT generate any HTML or run any script before receiving answers
Groups all questions into a single message

cases.description: Skill starts the brainstorming-compatible preview server in Phase 3
cases.prompt: Create a BBVA slide deck about digital transformation. Output: HTML. Theme: dark. Audience: executive board, formal.
expectations: Runs bash .../scripts/start-server.sh before writing any HTML
Saves screen_dir and state_dir from the server output
Tells the user the preview URL before generating the prototype
Does NOT use node server.js or any other server script

cases.description: Skill generates an HTML prototype at screen_dir/prototype.html with BBVA brand tokens
cases.prompt: Create a BBVA presentation about Q1 results. Type: slides. Format: HTML. Theme: dark. Audience: executive, formal.
expectations: Writes prototype to screen_dir/prototype.html, not to the working directory
Inlines brand/tokens.css into a <style> block in the HTML
Replaces SKILL_FONTS_DIR with the absolute path to assets/fonts/
Does NOT inline preview-shell.js or html2canvas — server injects them automatically
Prototype contains exactly 3 slides (title, one content, closing)
Each slide has both data-type and data-index attributes set

cases.description: Skill runs pptx.js (Playwright + PptxGenJS) for PPTX export
expectations: Runs: node .../scripts/export/pptx.js --input screen_dir/deck.html --tokens .../brand/tokens.json --theme dark --output exports_dir/deck.pptx
Does NOT run any Python script for PPTX generation
Does NOT run npx tsx generate_pptx.ts
Tells the user to run 'npm install pptxgenjs playwright' if packages are missing

cases.description: Skill uses correct BBVA brand colors from brand/tokens.json
cases.prompt: What are the official BBVA dark theme colors?
expectations: Dark background is #000519
Dark surface is #070E46
Dark accent is #FFE761
Primary is #001391
References brand/tokens.json as the canonical source, not scripts/brand_tokens.json

cases.description: Skill uses Tiempos Headline + Benton Sans BBVA, not Source Serif 4 or Lato
cases.prompt: What fonts should I use for a BBVA slide deck?
expectations: Headlines: Tiempos Headline (woff2 at assets/fonts/tiempos-headline-bold.woff2)
Body: Benton Sans BBVA (woff2 at assets/fonts/BentonSansBBVA-Book.woff2)
Does NOT recommend Source Serif 4 or Lato for BBVA slides
References brand/tokens.css for the @font-face declarations

cases.description: Skill explains PNG export is always available via the preview-shell toolbar
cases.prompt: Can I download the slides as PNG images?
expectations: Explains that the preview-shell toolbar is injected into every HTML output
Per-slide: hover over a slide to see the Export PNG button
Bulk: Export All PNGs button downloads all slides sequentially
Does NOT run a separate script for PNG export

cases.description: Skill does NOT activate for a generic non-BBVA presentation
cases.prompt: Create a presentation about machine learning fundamentals for my team
expectations: Does NOT read brand/tokens.json for BBVA colors
Does NOT apply BBVA color #001391 or #000519
Does NOT start the brainstorming preview server for this request

cases.description: Skill does NOT activate when user explicitly asks for RL3 brand
cases.prompt: I need an RL3 AI Agency branded deck
expectations: Does NOT apply BBVA brand tokens or colors
Does NOT use BBVA fonts
Routes to codi-rl3-brand skill instead

cases.description: Skill stops the preview server after delivering the final output
cases.prompt: The deck looks great. Export as PDF and we're done.
expectations: Runs node .../scripts/export/pdf.js for PDF export
After export, runs bash .../scripts/stop-server.sh with the session dir
Tells the user the PDF path and that the server has been stopped
